description: Composition100% cotton shirt with short sleeves, has bold checks in blue and green on a cream base, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the both chests, shoulder straps on either sides, and full length buttoned placket FittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this bold checked shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day, while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with jeans or chinos and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
